\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5792 introduces Rot Stable Attractor Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \lvert E_{B} - E_{\mathrm{rot}} \rvert < \varepsilon \quad \Longrightarrow \quad \text{stable attractor in phase space.} \]
